grant_title: 21st Century Community Learning Centers (21st CCLC) Program for Out-of-School-Time Programs in New Jersey
project_area: Out-of-school-time programs (before-school, afterschool, or summer) including academic remediation/enrichment, arts/cultural experiences, youth development, support services, physical activity, parental involvement, and literacy services for adult family members
demographic_requirements: Youth-focused programs serving students in New Jersey, with emphasis on promoting academic achievement, workforce development skills, life skills, and positive healthy choices. Programs must complement school-day learning and may include services for parents (e.g., literacy and educational services).
eligibility_summary: Open to local education agencies, non-profits, for-profits, community-based organizations, and faith-based organizations operating in New Jersey. Programs must provide enriching, hands-on, and creative opportunities that complement the school day, with a focus on student achievement, workforce development, and parental involvement.
